reason: Frontend spec entry — lists all conventions; this task lives in web/ frontend layer.
Feature-first layout; this task adds web/src/features/mails/{components,hooks,api,routes}.

Stateful render branches (UNAVAILABLE / BODY_ONLY_SIZE_LIMIT / FULL+ANALYZED), explicit no-color-only state, mandatory unauthorized vs empty vs error separation. Mail surface depends on this for the top-status-banner branching.
Domain hook naming (use-mail-analyses, use-mail-analysis); query-key conventions; URL-state filter encoding.
URL state for filter/sort/page/since/until; server state via TanStack Query; raw-body-not-stored constraint maps to no-cache-anywhere rule.
Branded ID aliases for MailTaskId/GatewayId; runtime zod parse with literal(false) on rawBodyStored; forbidden any.
UI forbidden patterns — sensitive fields rendered as plain strings, status fallback as clean, missing UNAVAILABLE branch — all relevant here.
Frontend mirrors backend zod contracts; mail mirror must preserve rawBodyStored: z.literal(false) compile-time guarantee.
Reuse <StatusBadge>/<UnauthorizedState>/<EmptyState>/<ErrorState> from console + vuln tasks; do not duplicate analysisMode/phishingLabel literals across components.

Platform PRD §7.1 Phishing Email Analysis: 50MB limit + BODY_ONLY_SIZE_LIMIT, UNAVAILABLE fail-open, mandatory four security headers, no-block forwarding semantics. §3 viewer/auditor permission boundaries.
Parent MVP PRD: wave order, 50MB constraint, frontend stack constraints.
Tracker parent PRD: shared contract mirror policy, URL state spec, sensitive display rules, role gating, suggested implementation order.
Sibling task that builds App / router / Providers / MSW worker / fetch helper / ActorProvider; this task depends on its shells and reuses its shared components.

Sibling task that established the 4-domain shared list pattern (cross-task aggregation, viewer route-level guard, MSW handler-side query/grouping, URL state); mail surface inherits these conventions verbatim.
This task's own PRD with locked decisions, pages, hooks, MSW handlers, ADR-lite, R1–R10, AC.

Source of truth for phishingLabel / analysisMode / analysisStatus enums, mailAnalysisRecordSchema, mailGatewayConfigSchema, attachmentAnalysis/IOC/forwarding sub-schemas; web mirror copies field names/enums verbatim.
MailAnalysisQuery defines the exact filter dimensions the MSW list handler must support (assetGroupId, gatewayId, phishingLabel, since, until, limit).
Shared severity/permissionPoint vocabulary used for raw_evidence:view route gating.
API error envelope shape that mail MSW handlers must emit.
ActorContext / permissionPoints (raw_evidence:view) consumed by route-level guard.
